meta.title: Graveyard cross-reference graph — which elimination produced which lesson / law
meta.discipline: Organizes EXISTING relationships only. No new claim, no edge interpretation. Each edge is sourced from a recorded artifact.

laws_and_disciplines.name: Forgone-beta invariant (PM-1)
laws_and_disciplines.statement: Idle capital is benchmarked as fully-invested equal-weight; a tilt earns no free credit for sitting in cash.
laws_and_disciplines.source: RR-Y1-005 §10; src/engine PM-1 guard; Stage-0 pm1_compliant flag

laws_and_disciplines.name: Cost-premise audit (un-inflated cost model)
laws_and_disciplines.statement: A tradeability verdict must run on a fidelity-checked cost model; an inflated cost model can mask the true wall (significance vs cost).
laws_and_disciplines.source: D-204 -> NRR-010 inflated-cost diagnosis -> D-207 calibration -> D-208

laws_and_disciplines.name: Sign-flip / post-hoc rescue ban
laws_and_disciplines.statement: A graveyard candidate is not revived by re-parametrizing, sign-flipping, sub-sampling, window-widening, or outlier-removal. The Stage-0 split is frozen before results; whatever the re-run shows, a grave stays a grave (no clean X_2).
laws_and_disciplines.source: INDEX_RECON_XU030_IN.md 'Neden Bir Duzeltme Bu Mezarligi Kurtarmaz'; VIOP_SSF_OI.md graveyard-commitment

laws_and_disciplines.name: Timing defeat (DISC-2) — co-movement is not a lead
laws_and_disciplines.statement: A signal strongly contemporaneous with price (lag-0) but empty in its knowable lagged form is co-movement, not prediction; orthogonal-timing on a price axis loses repeatedly.
laws_and_disciplines.source: D-211 (lag-0 NW-t=3.68 strong, lag-2 knowable t=0.73 empty); D-213 (lag-1~lag-0, weak-but-correct)

laws_and_disciplines.name: Liquidity-premium mirage
laws_and_disciplines.statement: Cross-sectional 'edges' that exist only in the illiquid tail (Gate-4 liquidity_collapse) are a liquidity premium, not a deployable retail edge; the apparent ALL-universe significance is illiquidity-driven and dies in the liquid universe.
laws_and_disciplines.source: NRR-007 (illiquid +1.20% vs liquid -0.31%); D-209 (ALL NW-t=2.565 vs liquid 0.61)

laws_and_disciplines.name: N<=3 measurement lock per thread
laws_and_disciplines.statement: An exhausted thread closes after at most 3 measurements; a value-premise change (e.g. corrected cost) is new information (a REVISIT), not a 4th round.
laws_and_disciplines.source: NRR-008 (value 3/3 KESIN-KAPANIR); D-208 (N<=3 REVISITED, premise changed)

axis_closures.statement: The cross-sectional factor-selection program is exhausted (3/3): hi52, lowvol63, value all closed; H2b (the last t>=2 candidate) also closed; NAV-discount (new time-series paradigm) SERAP.
Price-orthogonal single-asset timing loses on both tested axes; co-movement is not a lead, knowable content is weak/absent.
VIOP SSF open-interest growth carries no signed cross-sectional information; thin cross-section + unsigned construction.
Index-reconstitution demand-shock is priced in the 11-19-day public window; not retail-accessible.

relations.note: D-203 split value (SERAP) from EDGE-2 (real composite)
EDGE-2 = equal-weight composite; each constituent isolated and closed
same significance-wall pattern in liquid universe
time-series MR attempted after factor-selection exhausted; also SERAP
holding-discount (present) vs fund/CEF NAV-arb (NRR-009, ABSENT from master)
both test RR-038 timing theses; both lose in knowable form
uses the frozen-before-results Stage-0 + hash-guard discipline the validation engine codifies

yol2_ground_validation.statement: Across all five tested elimination axes (cross-sectional, orthogonal-timing, event-tilt-derivative, derivative-OI, mechanical-flow) no deployable retail edge was confirmed. This independently validates that Yol-2 (static-exposure + cost/tax discipline + quality, passive smart ground) is the rational base — not because prediction was untried, but because it was tried across five axes and failed each on a recorded, frozen-before-results basis.
yol2_ground_validation.note: This is an organization of existing findings, not a new claim. PEAD (event-tilt) is PENDING and excluded from the closure count.
